branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Algebraic / topological / index-theory diagnostic; branch-independent geometric structure

interpretation: Empirical Pearson r ~ 0.89 (full 9-point) and ~ 0.89 (skip-N=18) demonstrates a quantitative chirality-curvature tracking relationship across the lattice ladder. The linear-regression slope ~ 0.31 and small positive intercept ~ 0.02 are the empirical content of an Atiyah-Singer-type discrete-geometry relationship on the relational lattice; a closed-theorem identification would require a formal discrete index theorem, but the present empirical demonstration is robust to skip-N=18, free of finite-size selection in the leading correlation.
